explanation: All items except the microphone are primarily used to produce a distinct audible signal or call. A microphone captures and amplifies sound but does not produce its own inherent signal.

category: Greek Mythology: Figures and Elements of the Underworld
explanation: Charon, Cerberus, Hades, and the River Styx are all directly associated with the Greek Underworld. Zeus is the king of the Olympian gods, residing on Mount Olympus.

category: Words that are homophones of English alphabet letters
explanation: Bee, See, Eye, and Why are all words that sound exactly like letters of the English alphabet (B, C, I, Y respectively). Toe does not sound like any letter.
